+        Description = "Returns the current application configuration.",

+             "version": "1.0.0",
+             "features": {

+               "betaAccess": false
+             },
+             "maxConnections": 100
+           }
+           """;
+
+    [McpServerResource(
+        Uri = "config://app/health",
+        Name = "Health Status",

+               "uptime": "{{DateTime.UtcNow:O}}",

+                 "cache": "connected"
+               }
+             }
+             """;
+}
+
